How To Use It

All resist is the readable effect family. The value range applies the same display multipliers used by the game artifact tooltip, so it is easier to compare with in-game rolls.

Recycles Into

MaterialQty
Metal Scrap5-15
Big Metal Scrap0-2
Radiated Junk1-4
Toxic Waste1-2
